requirements.task_name: Buy two 5-micron 10-inch sediment filter cartridges under $40 each
requirements.task_description: Find 5-micron, 10-inch sediment filter cartridges that cost no more than $40 each and add 2 units of the cheapest matching product to the cart.

requirements.task_name: Order three 20L RO anti-scalant containers with free shipping under $250 each
requirements.task_description: Search for RO anti-scalant chemicals, filter to 20L containers under $250 with free shipping, and add 3 units of the cheapest matching product to the cart.

requirements.task_name: Select the highest-flow digital dosing pump under $1,200 with rating 4.5+
requirements.task_description: Find digital dosing pumps under $1,200 with a customer rating of at least 4.5 stars and choose the one with the highest flow rate, then add one unit to the cart.

requirements.task_name: Assemble a 3-stage 10-inch filter set (sediment, carbon, 1-micron) each under $60
requirements.task_description: Build a 3-stage cartridge set by adding one 10-inch sediment cartridge, one 10-inch carbon cartridge, and one 10-inch 1-micron polishing cartridge, each with a price under $60 and a rating of at least 4 stars.

requirements.task_name: Buy three 4040 RO membranes with ≥98% rejection under $350 each
requirements.task_description: Find 4040 RO membranes that have at least 98% salt rejection and cost no more than $350 each, then add 3 units of the cheapest matching membrane to the cart.

requirements.task_name: Compare conductivity meters under $500 and add the one with the widest measurement range
requirements.task_description: Use the comparison feature to compare at least three conductivity meters under $500 with 4+ star ratings and add the one with the highest maximum conductivity range to the cart.

requirements.task_name: Prepare a cart for a small hotel: water softener system and three 25kg salt bags
requirements.task_description: Add one water softener system with 2–3 m³/h flow under $2,000 and three 25kg regeneration salt bags under $25 each with free shipping to the cart.

requirements.task_name: Keep only the cheapest 20-inch stainless filter housing and set quantity to 4
requirements.task_description: Add two different 20-inch stainless steel filter housings under $600 to the cart, then from the cart keep only the cheaper one and update its quantity to 4 units.
